state_transition_rules: no failures, any degraded -> final status=degraded
stopped by marker, no failures -> final status=stopped
all completed, no stops -> final status=completed
stop_marker_tests: pre-race stop: StopMarker set before start -> 0 attempted, stopped
post-round stop: StopMarker set after round 1 -> no round 2
sleep stop: StopMarker set during sleep interval -> no next round
lock_tests: lock contention: external lock held -> no callable invoked, failed status
lock released after failure: re-acquirable after callable error
lock released after stop: re-acquirable after stop-marker stop
run_history_tests: parent row exists in run_history DB
child wrapper rows recorded with runner_label=bounded_shadow_child
fake_callable_scenarios: first degraded, continue_on_degraded=True -> runs second round
first degraded, continue_on_degraded=False -> stops after round 1
callable raises exception -> treated as failed
callable returns invalid status -> treated as failed
callable returns None -> treated as failed
forbidden_capabilities_checked: threading, multiprocessing, asyncio, sched, schedule, cron, systemd
create_order, cancel_order, withdraw, transfer, wallet, signing, private_key
known_limitations: Same-process only — FileLock prevents concurrent instances but not cross-machine coordination
No progress reporting — runner blocks until all rounds complete
No retry — failed callable is counted but not retried within same run
SQLite WAL mode used but may contend with other callables writing to the same DB
No external summary artifact by default — requires explicit injection
Clock resolution on Windows: time.time_ns() used for temp-file uniqueness
